entry.title: New IDC 47QMCA22D000N awarded to FCA US LLC for the amount of $0

ns1:legislativeMandates.ns1:otherStatutoryAuthority: IN ACCORDANCE WITH FPMR 101-26.501-1, GSA IS THE MANDATORY SOURCE FOR ALL NEW COMMERCIALLY AVAILABLE NON-TACTICAL VEHICLES PURCHASED IN THE UNITED STATES FOR USE BY EXECUTIVE AGENCIES AND THE DEPARTMENT OF DEFENSE.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:manufacturingOrganizationType.description: FOREIGN-OWNED BUSINESS INCORPORATED IN THE U.S.
